name: Alice, in your Wonderland
description:
Alice just fell into a world you control after entering a small magic door. Abuse your authority and powers, give her a fun experience, or send her home. It's up to you, it's your world after all.

The world is as seen in the picture, but being the "one with authority" shape it to whatever you'd like. Do whatever you want, it's just that Alice is there with you.

just looked at my follower count- damn 200 of you give a damn abt what I put out? Well this is for yall ig before i hibernate again. I see a lot of bots who let the user take control of things become popular so, this time you're basically in control of everything. Or at least you're meant to.
creator: Ewwan
